We build teams
that build your software.

Your partner for incredible mobile
and web products

KNOW MORE Contact

Software Engineering
A harmony of software house
skills and digital agency sensibility

Web Development

Our experts in PHP, Angular JS, WordPress, Python, and far more can build scalable, custom-oriented, user-friendly, secure, high-performing web apps and websites for your business.

Mobile Applications

Be accessible to every smart-phone user- Android or iOS, we develop easy to use mobile apps to elevate your brand value.

UI/UX Development

We are known for providing quality experiences to the end-users by building a highly responsive user-interface for acquiring more customers.

  • Timenox
    Workforce Monitor System

    Timenox
    Workforce Monitor System
    Simple, employee time-monitoring software with automatic screenshots. No matter where you are, you can get work done.

  • Taquilla APM – Event Booking System
    Event Booking System

    Taquilla APM – Event Booking System
    Event Booking System
    Taquilla APM is easy to use, for booking tickets for any type of venue or event. We provide you a hassle-free method to book tickets and exotic places in a matter of seconds with Taquilla APM.

  • Affordable blinds
    Customizable Blinds & Shades

    Affordable blinds
    Customizable Blinds & Shades
    Decorate your home by selecting the perfect blind for every room of yours. You can customize the blinds and shades according to your choices.

  • SHIFT HRM
    HR and Payroll Management

    SHIFT HRM
    HR and Payroll Management
    Providing mobility & scalability to simplify your day-to-day hr and payroll processes with the end-to-end solution is Your SHIFTHRM.

  • Authority Rush
    Domain Inventory

    Authority Rush
    Domain Inventory
    At Authority Rush our portfolio of personally acquired or handpicked domains are powerful, clean and always indexed to help you rank and make you money as soon as possible.

  • Uniform Store
    Customizable Uniforms Platform

    Uniform Store
    Customizable Uniforms Platform
    Ready to outfit your team with uniforms that build team spirit? Uniform Store gets everything you need to design your team’s custom workwear.

  • Invoicer
    Invoicing System

    Invoicer
    Invoicing System
    Our invoicing system lets you create invoices and keep track of multiple user accounts, various quotations, and critical billing information in one place with ease.

  • VIRGIN POS
    Point of Sale

    VIRGIN POS
    Point of Sale
    Orders at your fingertip: Whether placed in-store or from a mobile device, automatically sync all your orders through Virginpos.

  • TheROBODIALER
    Automated Call System

    TheROBODIALER
    Automated Call System
    Build up the bond with your customers by interacting with them and addressing their queries anytime with the ROBODIALER.

  • Todoish
    Smart Platform App

    Todoish
    Smart Platform App
    Control your day, week and month with calendar events and tasks in a single view. It’s the best way to manage your time and achieve your ambitious goals.

  • Setagendas
    Online Appointment Booking Platform

    Setagendas
    Online Appointment Booking Platform
    Setagendas is all you’ll ever need to ensure that your customers easily and efficiently complete the booking process.

  • CRM – Customer Relationship Management
    Customer Relationship Management

    CRM – Customer Relationship Management
    Customer Relationship Management
    The ultimate tool for business growth is strengthening the relationship between you and your customer. Our CRM software assists you to ascertain information about customers and streamlines the sales activity to boost revenue.

  • BoostCredit101
    Tradeline

    BoostCredit101
    Tradeline
    First, what is a tradeline? A tradeline is the industry term for any credit account that appears on your credit report.

  • Boletosenlinea-My Account
    Ticket Booking App

    Boletosenlinea-My Account
    Ticket Booking App
    Our app is a hassle-free way to book and reserve tickets at your convenience. Now see the status of booking from your comfort zone and plan your weekend without any hard work.

  • Boletosenlinea Validator
    Ticket Validator App

    Boletosenlinea Validator
    Ticket Validator App
    Use our ticket scanning app to scan your tickets at your event or business. Completely eliminate fake and duplicate tickets.

Why Coding Peak
At Coding Peak,
we code to solve the unsolved!

We have been turning industrial stumbling blocks to stepping
stones for the past 7 years by delivering robust web and software
solutions based in California, USA. We help small-scale enterprises to establish MNCs to lead in the market and stand out from the
competition.

Our team of certified developers examines the business problem and builds a ladder for your organization to grow.

LEARN MORE

Web
Development

Progressive
Web Apps

UI / UX Design

Python

Software
Development

Hybrid App
Development
Engineering Management
We synchronize to provide
the best possible solutions for
your business.

We believe in building effective high-tech solutions like
customized web and mobile apps, e-commerce advancement to
match up to your organizational needs for prolonged growth.

137+
Completed Projects
1200
Happy Customers
11k
Working Hours
23
Awards Winning
  • React.js

    Specializes in building vivid interfaces

    This efficient framework allows our developers to innovate with every component and offer a delightful experience to your customers that becomes possible only due to react.js as it is highly flexible and scalable read more...

    A productive and adaptable open-source Javascript library

    React.js is a compatible framework for search algorithms that makes your app rank higher on search pages as it consists of react-router and react-helmet that makes the job easy read more...

  • Python

    Create a long-lasting digital footprint with Python

    Python has gained popularity and created a buzz around due to its dynamic nature that allows companies to use it in whichever form they want, either in web development or building an enterprise software solution read more...

    The most dynamic programming language

    Python is an object-oriented language that has been in use to solve simple to complex problems. It possesses a wide range of libraries to support diverse programming languages like Java, C, C++, etc read more...

  • Django

    Effortless customization

    The prime motive behind building Django was to ease the development of complicated and data-driven websites. It simplifies the process of plugging components and speeds up the development process read more...

    A full-fledged web application framework

    Django is a full-fledged web application framework built on python that is used by companies to provide a pragmatic design to their users. It integrates with all ready to use components that saves the time read more...

  • Angular

    An inbuilt Model-View-Controller software architecture

    The angular framework is one of the robust tech stack tools our team uses to provide scalability to your app. Any enterprise considers the pros and cons before deciding on a framework to expand its business read more...

    An open-source front-end web framework

    It is based on Javascript and is an open-source front-end web framework that is suitable for the development as well as testing of applications. It allows developers to use HTML as their base template, and it eradicates read more...

  • PHP

    Enables the websites to be dynamic and user-friendly

    With the help of PHP, our developers can modify the database, encrypt data and control user accessibility, and create a high-powered website by captivating the users for the longest time read more...

    A go-to language for the web development process

    PHP is a scripting language that stands for PHP: Hypertext Preprocessor that allows integrating user-friendly functions in the website to offer a pleasing experience to the users. With the help read more...

  • PostgreSQL

    The most compatible database software

    PostgreSQL has been in use for a very long time and is the most compatible database software with diverse programming languages like Java, C, C++, etc. It allows us to provide customizable read more...

    Streamlines data management

    PostgreSQL is a reliable and relational database system that runs on multiple operating platforms to store, maintain, and secure data. The process of data handling becomes seamless with this robust read more...

  • NoSQL

    Achieve high operational speed and flexibility in storing the data

    NoSQL overcomes the limitation of a conventional database that helps to grow big companies in less time. The form of storing relationship data is different in NoSQL in comparison to relational databases read more...

    Leveraged the power of NoSQL to build robust advanced web and cloud-based applications

    NoSQL is suitable for handling your business data while you are growing as it uses a horizontal scale to scale endlessly. The horizontal scale is more effective when compared to the vertical as the former read more...

  • Node

    Compatible with diverse platforms

    Our developers are well-versed with this highly scalable, open-source, cross-platform infrastructure. Node.js consists of libraries for various JavaScript modules that ease the process of web application development read more...

    Node.js is highly scalable and open-source infrastructure

    Node.js is a JavaScript run-time system that uses the V8 Java search engine. JavaScript is one of the most popular programming languages today, and Node.js enhance the viability of this language to the next level read more...

  • What People Think of Us

    Our experience with Coding Peak was astonishing as they knew precisely about our needs. Their team gave us valuable suggestions that helped our small business to attract more customers. So if you are searching for a website development team, Coding peak is the trusted choice.

    Melissa Stone
    Black Bayside Co.
        

  • What People Think of Us

    We just started and had no clue about websites, so we started searching for website developers on google and found Coding Peak. We took a chance and contacted them online, their team replied instantly, and they work with us in an online mode or through phone calls, but it was a seamless experience due to their excellent customer support.

    James Kennedy
    Miller Corporation
        

  • What People Think of Us

    Coding Peak shows its commitment to quality and consistently conveys on schedule. The Coding Peak team is proficient and committed to delivering great sites. It is significant for us to have a Web improvement accomplice that shows this degree of duty and possession. We are incredibly glad to team up with Coding Peak.

    Ava Williams
    Soylent Corp.
        

  • What People Think of Us

    I have been using Coding Peak services for quite some time for my tech startup. I have never been so satisfied as their services are scalable, viable, user-friendly, and work effectively and efficiently in a business environment. If you are a budding entrepreneur, then I would highly recommend Coding Peak.

    Lance Jones
    Vista Corp.
        

  • What People Think of Us

    Our team connected to Coding Peak a year ago for robust business software that we needed for our organization as we were aiming to expand into different territories. Their team of experts includes skilled designers, professional and experienced programmers that can provide you effective software solutions for boosting your sales & increasing the productivity of your business.

    Emily Miles
    Pacilitz Enterprises
        

  • What People Think of Us

    Coding Peak has been patient throughout the process with me, and it is one of the best software development companies in the world. I will forever be grateful for helping my organization to understand customer needs and building the digital product that enables us to get leads in the market.

    Lucas Mendes
    Mendesally Holdings
        

  • What People Think of Us

    My journey with Coding Peak was blissful. They take care of every small need because I was not aware of the latest technological advancements taking place in the commercial world. Their experts helped me with everything; Designing, applications, software, and whatnot. They were available 24*7, and I am glad that I found them at the right time.

    Camila Montgomery
    Venture Enterprise
        

  • What People Think of Us

    They are so committed to their work and deliver the project on time. The technical staff was always with us to answer every query and clarify every doubt of ours. We were so happy and content when we saw our app; what we liked the most was the detailed user interface to give a comforting experience to our customers.

    Kelvin O'Connor
    Aprt Steel
        

  • What People Think of Us

    I can’t say enough regarding the incredible work that Coding Peak has done on my progressive web app. They took an underneath – routine app & changed it into an engaging & educational one. The team helps rejuvenate my vision. Their progressing support is awesome & is also the principal reason that we keep on working with them. It was a joyful experience with Coding Peak.

    Susan Adams
    Adams Store
        

  • What People Think of Us

    The team of Coding Peak was supportive throughout the process of developing hybrid apps for our retail store. They researched market trends, competitive landscape to provide a user-friendly app that satisfies the desires of our customers. It was a delightful experience working with their experts.

    Charlotte Evans
    Eveonic Enterprises
